1.title: Yojana Saathi | Grievance & Scheme Management System
1.description:
Yojana Saathi is a full-stack grievance and government scheme management system built to digitize complaint registration, tracking, and resolution for citizens.

Beyond standard grievance handling, the platform includes an ML-based recommendation engine that suggests relevant government schemes to users based on their profile, making public services more accessible and personalized.

This project focuses on real-world civic-tech problems — reducing paperwork friction, automating communication, and using data to connect people with schemes they may not know they qualify for.

subPoints.title: Key Features
subPoints.des:
• Grievance Management: Citizens can register, track, and follow up on complaints through a structured workflow.
  • ML-Based Scheme Recommendation: A FastAPI-powered recommendation system suggests personalized government schemes based on user profile data.
  • Automated Notifications: Nodemailer sends real-time email updates on grievance status changes.
  • File Uploads: Cloudinary integration for scalable storage of supporting documents and proof attachments.
  • User Authentication: Secure login and role-based access for citizens and administrators.

subPoints.title: Technologies Used
subPoints.des:
• React.js: For a responsive citizen-facing frontend.
  • Node.js & Express.js: Core backend server and REST API routes.
  • MongoDB: Storage for grievances, users, and scheme data.
  • FastAPI & Python: Powers the ML-based scheme recommendation microservice.
  • Cloudinary: Scalable storage for uploaded documents.
  • Nodemailer: Automated email notifications for status updates.

2.title: AI-Powered Blog-App - MindScript
2.description:
MindScript is an intelligent blog creation platform built using the MERN stack and integrated with Google Gemini API to generate high-quality, AI-generated blog content.

Designed with seamless user experience in mind, users can easily log in and create engaging blog posts with just a few prompts—automating the content generation process while maintaining creative control.

This project demonstrates our ability to integrate AI capabilities within full-stack applications, making content creation smarter, faster, and more efficient.

subPoints.title: Key Features
subPoints.des:
• CRUD Functionality: Fully functional Create, Read, Update, and Delete operations on blogs and their comments.
  • AI Text Generation: Generate engaging blog content through prompt-based input using Google Gemini API.
  • User Authentication: Admin-protected access for content management and moderation.

subPoints.title: Technologies Used
subPoints.des:
• React.js: For building a responsive and dynamic frontend.
  • Node.js & Express.js: To handle the backend server and API routes.
  • MongoDB: For efficient blog data storage and retrieval.
  • Google Gemini API: To power the AI blog content generation feature.
  • JWT Authentication: Secure login with predefined credentials (admin@mindscript.com).

3.title: NexAnime | AI-Powered Anime Recommendation Platform
3.description:
NexAnime is a full-stack anime discovery platform built around a hybrid machine learning recommendation engine, split into three dedicated services: a React frontend, a Node.js API gateway, and a Python FastAPI ML server.

The core of the project is a hybrid recommendation system that blends popularity-based filtering (an IMDB-style weighted rating formula with time decay), content-based filtering (TF-IDF + Nearest Neighbors on genre/synopsis/studio data), and collaborative filtering (Nearest Neighbors on a sparse user-rating matrix) — merged using a rank-based fusion algorithm.

Models were trained offline in Jupyter notebooks on a 24,000+ title MyAnimeList dataset, then serialized and served through a dedicated inference microservice — mirroring how real-world ML systems separate offline training from online serving.

subPoints.title: Key Features
subPoints.des:
• Hybrid Recommendation Engine: Combines content-based and collaborative filtering with weighted rank fusion for "Watch these next" suggestions.
  • Smart Home Page Ranking: Custom weighted-scoring formula (Bayesian average + normalized metrics + time decay) surfaces Top, Recent, and Classic anime.
  • Fast Search & Filtering: In-memory dataset querying by genre, rating, type, and source for instant results.
  • Anime Detail Modal: Rich metadata view with personalized recommendations for the selected title.
  • Offline Model Training Pipeline: Five structured Jupyter notebooks covering data exploration, cleaning, popularity-formula design, content-based modeling, and collaborative filtering.

subPoints.title: Technologies Used
subPoints.des:
• React.js: Fast, responsive frontend with a custom dark theme.
  • Node.js & Express.js: API gateway serving anime metadata and proxying ML requests.
  • FastAPI & Python: Dedicated ML microservice for recommendation inference.
  • Scikit-learn: TF-IDF vectorization and Nearest Neighbors models for content-based and collaborative filtering.
  • Pandas & NumPy: Data cleaning, weighted-score computation, and in-memory dataset handling.
  • SciPy: Sparse matrix representation for efficient collaborative-filtering computation.
  • Jupyter Notebooks: Offline model training, EDA, and algorithm experimentation.

4.title: Expense-Tracker App
4.description:
The Expense-Tracker is a web application designed to help users manage their personal finances effectively. It allows users to track their income and expenses, providing insights into their spending habits.

With a user-friendly interface, the app enables users to add, edit, and delete transactions, categorize expenses, and view summaries of their financial activities.

This project demonstrates the ability to create a full-stack application with a focus on data management and user experience.

subPoints.title: Key Features
subPoints.des:
• Transaction Management: Add, edit, and delete income and expense transactions.
  • Financial Summaries: View summaries of income, expenses, and balance over time.
  • Expense Categorization: Categorize expenses for better tracking and analysis.
  • User Authentication: Secure login and registration for personalized financial management.

subPoints.title: Technologies Used
subPoints.des:
• React.js: For building a responsive and dynamic frontend.
  • Node.js & Express.js: To handle the backend server and API routes.
  • MongoDB: For efficient transaction data storage and retrieval.
  • JWT Authentication: Secure user authentication and session management.

5.title: Sort Algorithm Visualization
5.description:
SortAlgorithm is a web-based application designed to provide real-time visualizations of popular sorting algorithms such as Merge Sort and Quick Sort.

These visualizations make it easier to understand, explore, and learn complex algorithms interactively.

SortAlgorithm offers an engaging and interactive way to visualize how sorting algorithms work step-by-step. It's especially useful for students, developers, and anyone learning algorithms.

subPoints.title: Outcome
subPoints.des:
• Users can visualize how sorting algorithms work in real-time.
  • Users can learn about the time complexity of each algorithm.
  • A hands-on approach to deepen understanding of sorting techniques.

subPoints.title: Technologies Used
subPoints.des:
• HTML: To structure the content and layout.
  • CSS: To style the application and make it visually appealing.
  • JavaScript: To implement dynamic sorting animations and interactions.
